name: public_health_newsroom_s_automated_stonehaven_rig_utl
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health newsroom automated stonehaven rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Harper Park
agents.identity: I am Harper Park, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Sana Vasquez, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of utility.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of rights even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Harper Park must choose under rights versus utility. What does Harper Park do?
